reviews.review_text: theres quite a lot of bugs and translation issue, but other than that it is the greatest xian xia game i have ever played
I love cultivation and this is a fun thing that includes a lot of things in the lore. It's my first playthrough and it's fun.

Truly a hidden gem, a diamond in rough but a gem nevertheless.

The good: Lots of contents, lots of replayability, lots of builds, lots of everything.

The bad:
1) Poor english translation, It's not so bad that it's unplayable, but bad enough to be noticeable everywhere. 

2) Poorly polish and poor presentation. 
All the men look like girls.
The portait customization doesn't reflect in game character especially the hair, you also can't customize hair color.
Old people still have young face but with white hair. 
NPC with "ugly" in their stats don't look ugly in their portait. If everyone is beautiful, then no one is beautiful.

3) Poor controller support. 
Only x360 controller works properly, ds4 buttons are bugged, dualsense doesn't work at all. No ds4 button promps. Even with x360 controller; sometime selecting dialog option can be bugged and always select the first box even when you didn't. 

If I had to give it a score, it would be a 7/10, because even with all its flaws, it's still a very fun game. If they fixed the controllers and maybe polish the game a bit more, it'll be a solid 9/10.

If you love Wuxia novels this game is for you. You will need to make the game run for your computer due to the language issue, steam comment section has a walk though god bless that guy.  The game is everything you want from a novel, from rivals, to starting OP, fighting beast, or participating in sect wars. 10/10

Bad thing: 1. the game may not launch at first but there's a easy fix, you only do it once and good to go. 

Good thing: 1. I didnt know I'd enjoy it, 550 hours in the 1st month.
2. Having fun with mod, mostly in CN so you may need to use google translate to find what you want. There's also ENG mod, minority but some of them are GOAT.

Wuxia and bullet hell is something I wouldnt dreamt playing such a nice combination that may not for everyone. The price was ok just 10 bucks ( Main game + 5 Bloom DCL, I don play survival mode )

Hope this help for those who wanna try this.

No recommend, there is little guide to help you around. The world is very dangerous, you'll die quiet a bit early.  Nothing is clear to where to get the stuff you need to advance. Most NPCs are OP to you even same level.  You're best avoid any random fights at all, but you still can't avoid people who's got a grudge on you.  There is no progression zone, fights feels likes you are open to enemy or ht enemies are OP to you.  I put it down and picked it up again few times but the game is not fun at all.

Kowtow to this young master 10,000 times and cripple your own cultivation, only then may I leave your corpse intact.

Dare to covet this ancestor's profound yin arts manual? Hastening your departure to the cycle of reincarnation.

Junior has eyes but fails to recognize mount tai.
It is a very good and addicting game..
as a fan of wuxia/xianxia games, this is a good games for someone with a low-mid pc
Still learning the ropes. BUT if you enjoy the Chinese Animes You'll love this game!!!
being an immortal that killed people in lower realm is great :D
